name: Rockhopper Exploration plc
description: Rockhopper Exploration plc is an oil and gas exploration and production company based in the United Kingdom. Founded in 2004, the company's key interests are focused on the North Falkland Basin, where it holds a significant interest in the Sea Lion project, as well as other exploration licences. Rockhopper also holds a portfolio of production, development, and exploration assets in the Greater Mediterranean region, including interests in Italy.
